uplink.description: BLE tracker, mode 1, idle (no alarm, no steps)
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input; expected.data authored here via the oracle method (run reference/upstream-codec.js, then map: batV->battery, alarm->action.motion.detected, step_count->action.motion.count, BLE scan fields->camelCase extras). bytes[5]=1 selects mode 1; uuid = chars of bytes 6-10 = 'EEFF0'.

uplink.description: Mode 1 with alarm asserted and non-zero step count
uplink._note: Synthetic: byte2=0x21 -> alarm high nibble = 2 (detected true), low nibble 1 combines with bytes 3-4 (0x000005) for step_count = (1<<16)|5 = 65541. battery = 0x1000/1000 = 4.096.
Error path: only fPort 2 carries tracker uplinks.
